title: Belha Devi Temple
tagline: Belha Devi Temple — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Belha Devi Temple (Hindi: बेल्हा देवी मंदिर) is an old Hindu temple in the city of Bela Pratapgarh, dedicated to the goddess Belha, the local incarnation of the Devi (Mother Goddes
overview.description: Belha Devi Temple (Hindi: बेल्हा देवी मंदिर) is an old Hindu temple in the city of Bela Pratapgarh, dedicated to the goddess Belha, the local incarnation of the Devi (Mother Goddess). Belha Devi Temple is another Shakti temple situated in Pratapgarh district of Uttar Pradesh state of India. The name of the city Bela (now called Bela Pratapgarh or Pratapgarh) is derived from Maa Belha Devi. This temple is dedicated to city's patron Goddess Belha Bhavani.

topPlaces.name: Bela Pratapgarh
topPlaces.description: Bela Pratapgarh is a town and a municipal board in Pratapgarh district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Pratapgarh, Uttar Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Pratapgarh is a town and municipality in the state of Uttar Pradesh in India. Pratapgarh is the administrative headquarters of Pratapgarh district, part of the Prayagraj division, formerly known as Allahabad.

topPlaces.name: Sadar, Uttar Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Sadar is a town and a tehsil in Pratapgarh district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Katra Medniganj
topPlaces.description: Katra Medniganj is a town and a nagar panchayat in Pratapgarh district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. The town is named Katra Medniganj to pay the respects to a great freedom fighter of 18th century, Shree Babu Medini Singh, brother of the soldier Babu Gulab Singh.

items.note: Bela Pratapgarh is a town and a municipal board in Pratapgarh district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

Pratapgarh is a town and municipality in the state of Uttar Pradesh in India. Pratapgarh is the administrative headquarters of Pratapgarh district, part of the Prayagraj division, formerly known as Allahabad.
Sadar is a town and a tehsil in Pratapgarh district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

Katra Medniganj is a town and a nagar panchayat in Pratapgarh district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. The town is named Katra Medniganj to pay the respects to a great freedom fighter of 18th century, Shree Babu Medini Singh, brother of the soldier Babu Gulab Singh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Belha Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Belha Devi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Belha Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Prayagraj Airport (Bamrauli) (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Prayagraj Junction (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Belha Devi Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Belha Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Belha Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Belha Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Belha Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bela Pratapgarh, Pratapgarh, Uttar Pradesh, Sadar, Uttar Pradesh, Katra Medniganj.
